ddls:
CREATE TABLE "roasters" (
  "roaster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roaster */,
  "roaster_name" TEXT /* Name of the roaster */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the roaster */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the roaster */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the roaster */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the roaster */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the roaster (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roaster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coffee_beans" (
  "coffee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coffee bean */,
  "roaster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the roaster who uploaded the coffee bean */,
  "coffee_name" TEXT /* Name of the coffee bean */,
  "region" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the coffee bean was grown */,
  "variety" INTEGER /* ID of the variety of the coffee bean */,
  "processing_method" INTEGER /* ID of the processing method used for the coffee bean */,
  "altitude" INTEGER /* ID of the altitude at which the coffee bean was grown */,
  "harvest_year" INTEGER /* Year the coffee beans were harvested */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number for traceability */,
  "roast_date" TEXT /* Date the coffee was roasted */,
  "roast_level" TEXT /* Roast level (e.g., light, medium, dark) */,
  "package_weight" REAL /* Weight of the coffee package */,
  "inventory_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the coffee in inventory */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the coffee recipe */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coffee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coffee_beans_roaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("roaster_id") REFERENCES roasters ("roaster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coffee_beans_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coffee_beans_altitude FOREIGN KEY ("altitude") REFERENCES altitudes ("altitude_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coffee_beans_variety FOREIGN KEY ("variety") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coffee_beans_processing_method FOREIGN KEY ("processing_method") REFERENCES processing_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variety */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the variety */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the variety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the processing method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the processing method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "altitudes" (
  "altitude_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each altitude range */,
  "altitude_range" TEXT /* Range of altitudes (e.g., 1000-1500m) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the altitude range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("altitude_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasting_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tasting note */,
  "coffee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee bean being tasted */,
  "tasting_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the flavor profile of the coffee bean */,
  "taster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taster */,
  "tasting_date" TEXT /* Date when the tasting was conducted */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the taster */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the tasting note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tasting note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tasting note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasting_notes_taster_id FOREIGN KEY ("taster_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasting_notes_coffee_id FOREIGN KEY ("coffee_id") REFERENCES coffee_beans ("coffee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., roaster, taster, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "coffee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee bean being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the coffee bean */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the coffee bean was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, taste) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the coffee bean */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_coffee_id FOREIGN KEY ("coffee_id") REFERENCES coffee_beans ("coffee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
